description_long: This is a round cake with a thick layer of white, textured icing covering its exterior. The top is generously decorated with crumbled chocolate cookies, whole sandwich cookies, and a prominent brown bear figurine, giving it a playful and rustic appearance. The cake sits on a clear, crinkled glass or plastic plate, which adds a subtle reflective quality to its base. The icing appears to be soft and creamy, with uneven, hand-applied swirls and some areas where the cake beneath is faintly visible. The bear figurine is positioned as if walking across the cookie-laden surface, making it the focal point of the decoration. The overall look is whimsical and themed, likely appealing for celebrations or special occasions.
description: A round cake with white icing, topped with crumbled and whole chocolate cookies and a brown bear figurine, displayed on a clear plate. The decoration is playful and rustic, with a creamy, textured finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear figurine facing forward, surrounded by whole and crumbled cookies on a thick layer of white icing.
description_view_1: Side view with the bear figurine in profile, highlighting the dense cookie topping and the cake's smooth, creamy sides.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bear figurine, with more focus on the back of the cake and the arrangement of cookies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the bear from behind and the uneven, hand-applied icing texture.
